---
title: ""
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'undergrad.html'))})
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    css: "style.css"
---

<center> <h1>Undergraduate Education</h1> </center>

<div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

<center>
<img src="cmu.png">
</center>

<div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

    
## Bachelors of Arts: Mathematics and Economics

Mount Holyoke College, South Hadley, MA


- **Graduated:** 2014   

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>
